macro.plain_english: Global slowdown risk is MODERATE: physical demand is contracting in China, Finland while Korea, US, Peru still expand. Inflation pressure is HIGH: prices are rising in UAE, Brazil, Saudi Arabia WITH volumes falling (supply-driven — the bad kind: raises prices AND hurts growth).

notes.US-freight: CONFIRMED: inventories drawing down while price leads — genuine tightening, boom has room
notes.PE-copper: CONFIRMED: utilization rising with volumes — real capex
notes.FI-pulp: EARLY-TURN WATCH: stocks drawing down despite weak prints — restock impulse may be forming
